👋 Welcome to the O2C Query Interface

Ask natural language questions about the Order-to-Cash dataset. The system will analyze the data and return accurate, grounded answers.
  • Trace document flows end-to-end
  • Find broken or incomplete chains
  • Analyze revenue, products, customers
  • Identify blocked or cancelled records

⚠ Add your Gemini API key in the top-right to enable AI queries.
